data.body:
v0.7.1 released — ALL channels verified at 0.7.1, both automated channels created hands-off by the workflow (Actions run 28806482655):
- PyPI: nava-rebar 0.7.1 live (pypi.org/pypi/nava-rebar/0.7.1/json).
- GitHub Release v0.7.1: marked Latest, author=github-actions[bot] (AUTO-created by the github_release job, NOT manual), assets nava_rebar-0.7.1-{py3-none-any.whl,tar.gz} attached.
- MCP Registry: io.github.navapbc/rebar 0.7.1, isLatest=true (published by the mcp_registry OIDC job — no interactive login).
- Homebrew tap: Formula/rebar.rb url+sha256 bumped to the 0.7.1 sdist, pushed to navapbc/homebrew-rebar (commit 83391e1).
- Smoke test: clean pipx install of nava-rebar[mcp]==0.7.1 (verified Version: 0.7.1) passes end-to-end (init/create/claim/comment/close -> closed, list, fsck, rebar-mcp).
Note: the mcp_registry job failed on first attempt due to a PyPI-propagation race (registry's PyPI validation 404'd right after publish); a re-run of the failed job succeeded once PyPI served 0.7.1. Follow-up: add a short retry/wait to the mcp_registry step.
